summary: Comprehensive testing of Calendar/Event Management feature. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All calendar features working correctly - list view, grid view, create event dialog, event detail dialog, RSVP stats display, navigation integration.

issues: Hydration warnings about <span> inside <option>/<select> elements - cosmetic issue from fiscal year selector, no functional impact
Missing DialogDescription warning for EventDetailDialog - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: EventDetailDialog.js missing DialogDescription for accessibility - add aria-describedby or DialogDescription component
seed_data_creation: Test events created and cleaned up automatically via pytest fixtures and Playwright cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar/Event feature fully tested. Key tests: 1) Event CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete), 2) Fine type auto-creation when event has fine_amount, 3) Fine type auto-deletion when event is deleted, 4) Response stats visible for admin (zugesagt/abgesagt/keine_antwort), 5) RSVP requires member_id (admin cannot respond), 6) Calendar list and grid views toggle correctly, 7) Event detail dialog shows edit/delete buttons for admin, 8) Navigation drawer shows 'Termine' menu item for all roles, 9) All other pages (Dashboard, Members, Fine Types, Statistics) still work correctly.

backend: GET /api/events - List all events with response_open, response_deadline_passed, my_response, response_stats
POST /api/events - Create event with title, date, location, description, fine_amount
DELETE /api/events/{id} - Delete event (also deletes fine type and responses)
POST /api/events/{id}/respond - RSVP validation (requires member_id, valid response)
Fine type auto-creation for events with fine_amount
Fine type auto-deletion when event is deleted
Seed events verified: Übungsabend (5€ fine) and Schützenfest 2026 (10€ fine)
frontend: Calendar page loads with list view showing upcoming and past events
Calendar page switches to grid/calendar view
Create event dialog opens and creates event successfully
Event detail dialog shows event info, RSVP buttons, and response overview
Navigation drawer shows 'Termine' menu item for all roles
Fine amount displayed on event cards as warning

notes.rsvp_limitation: Admin user has no member_id so cannot respond to events. To test RSVP functionality, a user with role 'mitglied' or 'spiess' with a linked member_id would be needed.
notes.seed_events: Two seed events exist: 'Übungsabend' (2026-04-10, 5€ fine) and 'Schützenfest 2026' (2026-05-15, 10€ fine)
